name: @aibender/integration
description: Cross-department integration suite (plan §9.3 'Testing between departments' + §9.4 enumeration). ASSEMBLES the BE/FE/SI seams end-to-end from the ALREADY-FROZEN devices (golden corpora, composeBroker, read-model publisher, arch tests, live-check registry); it never re-implements logic a single package already unit-tests. Every test names the §9.3 row it covers. T3 live-host halves are enumerated (not run) here via the live-check meta-test.
